item.name: Horse Chestnut Leg Gear Coffer (IL 515)
item.description:
A wooden chest containing a piece of attire. Though the exact design of said garb is yet to be determined, you sense it involves the legs in some capacity.

Required level: 80. IL: 515. Leg gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
